name: pokemon-online
description: Pokemon Online - a friend co-op Pokemon raising game. Design First, frontend-computed, Cloudflare Workers + D1 save server.

scripts.smoke: npm run canvas:archive-check && npx esbuild scripts/smoke.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=.smoke.mjs --log-level=warning && node .smoke.mjs && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.smoke.mjs', { force: true })"
scripts.balance: npx esbuild scripts/balance-report.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=.balance-report.mjs --log-level=warning && node .balance-report.mjs && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.balance-report.mjs', { force: true })"
scripts.tactics: npx esbuild scripts/tactics-report.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=.tactics-report.mjs --log-level=warning && node .tactics-report.mjs && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.tactics-report.mjs', { force: true })"
scripts.visuals:report: npx esbuild scripts/visual-report.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=.visual-report.mjs --log-level=warning && node .visual-report.mjs && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.visual-report.mjs', { force: true })"
scripts.visuals:browser: npx esbuild scripts/visual-browser-report.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.visual-browser-report.mjs --log-level=warning && node .visual-browser-report.mjs && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.visual-browser-report.mjs', { force: true })"
scripts.visuals:playable: npx esbuild scripts/playable-renderer-observation.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.playable-renderer-observation.mjs --log-level=warning && node .playable-renderer-observation.mjs && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.playable-renderer-observation.mjs', { force: true })"
